params.label: Default Interaction Mode
params.description: Active mode when none is explicitly set

params.label: Challenge Level
params.description: How hard AI should push back on assumptions

params.label: Artifact Generation Gate
params.description: When AI asks before producing artifacts

params.label: Ambiguity Handling
params.description: What AI does when intent is unclear

params.label: Scope Discipline
params.description: How strictly AI stays within the stated task

params.label: Coding Strictness
params.description: How conservatively AI approaches code changes

params.label: Confidence Display
params.description: How AI signals uncertainty in its outputs

params.label: Session Close Style
params.description: How AI behaves at session end

params.label: Initiative Level
params.description: Whether AI volunteers next steps or waits

params.label: Error Recovery
params.description: How AI handles its own mistakes

params.label: Context Decay Handling
params.description: How AI manages coherence in long sessions

params.label: Limitation Acknowledgment
params.description: What AI does when it hits the edge of its knowledge

params.label: Vocabulary Anchoring
params.description: Whether AI adopts HUM's local terms or uses its own

params.label: Context Priority
params.description: What wins when a new prompt conflicts with primed context
